author: NETWORG
name: Power Platform: Script Library
description: Creates a TypeScript web resource project with Rollup bundler (UMD output). Supports npm packages via ES module imports, bundled into a single .js file. The UMD name creates a global namespace for Dataverse form/button references (e.g., MyNamespace.Main.onLoad). After generating, add as a project reference from the solution that uses it.

LibraryName.description: Web resource logical name and output file name (e.g., talxis_documentgen). Used as ScriptLibraryName in .csproj and rollup output file.

LibraryNamespace.description: UMD global namespace for Dataverse form/button references (e.g., TALXIS_DocumentGeneration). Forms reference functions as LibraryNamespace.ClassName.methodName.
